sweeps.summary: Six items added: PFE, PLTR and PYPL Q1 2026 earnings; the May 4 Iranian drone strike on UAE's Fujairah oil hub that pushed Brent +5.8%; the 30Y UST yield breaching 5% for the first time since July 2025; and the third straight day of U.S. spot bitcoin ETF net inflows ($532M).

added.title: Pfizer Q1 2026 — beats on EPS and revenue, reaffirms full-year outlook
added.note: Mega-cap pharma earnings beat with reaffirmed FY guidance — primary-source confirmed.

added.title: Palantir Q1 2026 — revenue +85% Y/Y, raises FY26 guide to 71% growth, stock dips on valuation
added.note: 85% Y/Y growth + 10pt guide raise, but next-day stock dropped ~3.8% — earnings + mover.

added.title: PayPal Q1 2026 — beats top and bottom but stock plunges ~10% on cautious guidance
added.note: Beat Q1 but ~10% premarket drop on cautious 2026 transaction-margin guidance — earnings + mover.

added.title: Iran drone strike sets fire at UAE Fujairah oil hub; Brent jumps 5.8% to $114
added.note: First Iranian strike on UAE since April 8 ceasefire; Brent +5.8% to $114.44 — primary geopolitical+commodity.

added.title: 30-year Treasury yield breaches 5% for first time since July 2025 as oil-driven inflation bites
added.note: 30Y yield closed above 5% (5.021%) for first time since July 2025 — major rates milestone.

added.title: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs draw $532M on May 4 — third straight day of net inflows
added.note: Third straight day of net inflows totaling $532M led by BlackRock IBIT — notable crypto flow signal.

sweeps.summary: Four new releases: Pinterest's Q1 beat + raised guide + ~$2B buyback (~+15%), Shopify's Q1 revenue beat with a slower-growth Q2 guide (~-7%), Duolingo's Q1 beat undercut by a 10.5% FY bookings guide (~-13%), and Hubbell's $3B cash acquisition of NSI Industries.

added.title: Pinterest Q1 2026 — revenue +18%, raised Q2 guide and $2B buyback send shares ~15% higher
added.note: Beat + raise + $2B buyback with ~+15% move clears the major bar (≥3% single-name and ≥2 tier-1 outlets).

added.title: Shopify Q1 2026 — revenue +34% with $100B GMV but stock falls ~7% as Q2 guide signals slower growth
added.note: Mega-cap-relevant SaaS with named guidance catalyst and ~7% sell-off; primary IR press release plus 8-K available.

added.title: Duolingo Q1 2026 — revenue +27% but full-year bookings guide of 10.5% growth knocks shares ~13%
added.note: Named bookings-guide catalyst with ~13% move clears mover bar; primary press release on globenewswire plus SEC 8-K.

added.title: Hubbell to acquire NSI Industries from Sentinel for $3B in cash, betting on electrification and datacenter buildout
added.note: $3B all-cash deal with ~15.5x EBITDA multiple disclosed via Hubbell's official press release and 8-K — clean primary M&A item.

sweeps.summary: Three additions: GameStop's unsolicited $56B bid for eBay (May 3); Amazon's launch of Amazon Supply Chain Services (May 4) that knocked UPS ~10% and FedEx ~9%; and Tyson Foods' FQ2 2026 beat with a raised FY26 guide.

added.title: GameStop offers ~$56B unsolicited bid for eBay at $125/share, half cash and half stock
added.note: Unsolicited $56B bid disclosed publicly by GameStop on May 3, with eBay board acknowledging receipt; widely covered tier-1 today.

added.title: Amazon opens its full logistics network to outside businesses, sending UPS ~10% lower and FedEx ~9% lower
added.note: Sector-defining launch with named anchor customers and clear single-day moves in UPS and FDX.

added.title: Tyson Foods FQ2 2026 — adj EPS $0.87 beats $0.76, raises FY26 op income guide; shares jump ~8%
added.note: Beat consensus, raised FY26 guidance, ~+8% on the day.
